programme.desc: A Creature Power Suit malfunction transforms Martin into an acorn and grows him into an oak tree.

programme.title: Hero Elementary: Turtle Beach/ Shine a Light on Me

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Mary Anning/ I Am Charlie Chaplin
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Curious George: Curious George Discovers the Poles
programme.desc: George takes care of Bill's pet tadpoles; George and Hundley get lost.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel Says I'm Sorry/ The Royal Mudpies
programme.desc: Teacher Harriet helps Daniel, Katerina and Miss Elaina learn how to apologize to a friend.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Astronaut Ellen Ochoa!
programme.desc: The kids help Astronaut Ellen Ochoa solve an engineering problem, inspiring Ellen to use the same solution for the engineering project at the DSA.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why: Make Music Naturally/ Light the Way
programme.desc: Follow a curious bunny named Elinor as she asks the questions in every child's mind.

programme.title: Sesame Street: A Very Special Fiesta
programme.desc: Charlie, Grover, Rudy, and Abby help Rosita and her abuela plan for a friend's fiesta. While trying to figure out what they need for the party, they try to guess who Rosita and her abuela's friend could be.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Pinkalicious/ Glitterizer
programme.desc: Mommy shows Pinkalicious her latest invention; the Glitterizer, a machine that sprays glitter.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Tudor Week
programme.desc: Follow the five remaining bakers as they attempt to re-create dishes fit for the Tudors. The signature is a savoury stuffed pie, the technical is an unusual Tudor biscuit that has the bakers tied up in knots, and the showstopper is a marzipan spectacle.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Miss Scarlet and the Duke: The Woman in Red
programme.desc: A man is caught with a bloodied knife at a murder scene. Eliza is hired to prove his innocence, even though he has confessed. Also, she is about to be evicted.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James is put to the test with an ailing racehorse. Tristan faces a familiar temptation. Siegfried angles for a prestigious client.

programme.title: Secrets of Westminster
programme.desc: Go inside its gothic walls and discover the hidden worlds of the House of Commons and the House of Lords, where back-stabbing, intrigue and traditions are the order of the day.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Her Negotiation
programme.desc: Detective Rollins has a bad feeling about a suspect and calls on the entire SVU squad for help. A shocking theory comes to light, the situation rapidly escalates and Detective Benson is put into mortal danger.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Surrender Benson
programme.desc: The SVU squad takes drastic measures to find Det. Benson and her abductor. A trail of murders and rape victims leads them to fear it may be too late.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Parent's Nightmare
programme.desc: An 8-year-old boy disappears from school and his mother receives a ransom request. When surveillance footage shows that the boy recognized his abductor, detectives work with his mother and her ex-husband to find and arrest the suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Heartfelt Passages
programme.desc: When the investigation of Corrections Officer Gary Munson deepens, he and his union take drastic actions that threaten the lives of ADA Barba and the SVU Squad.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Great Expectations
programme.desc: The SVU investigates the players of a top youth hockey team after a vicious locker room hazing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead leading Rollins to go undercover at the last place she was seen alive, a high-end rehab center. Meanwhile, Benson tries to overcome her doubts about Sheila.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intent
programme.desc: The officers become entangled in an elaborate online hoax that ends with the sexual assault of a popular social media star. Det. Benson sets firm ground rules with Sheila.

programme.title: The Rev: Meet the Hartleys
programme.desc: Richard returns to find a choir that's out of tune and adult children that may never move out.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do You Believe in Magic?
programme.desc: Fearful that the romance between him and Claire is fizzling, Phil calls upon his alter ego, Clive Bixby, to get Valentine’s Day back on track. Jay and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness.

programme.title: Modern Family: Finding Fizbo
programme.desc: Cam is enraged when he receives an online video showing someone has been desecrating his beloved Fizbo costume, which sets him on a quest to restore Fizbo's good name.

programme.title: Modern Family: Basketball
programme.desc: After choking at last year's charity basketball game, Phil has been training all year to redeem himself. However, when NBA stars Charles Barkley and DeAndre Jordan attend the game and start making bets, Phil tries to not buckle under the pressure.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pig Moon Rising

programme.desc: Mitch and Cam have five minutes to catch a new flight while fighting the effects of sleeping pills they took prematurely. Then, at Rainer's birthday dinner, Haley and Rainer are forced to re-evaluate their entire relationship in the five minutes.

programme.desc: Detectives Benson and Amaro investigate the disappearance of a teenaged girl who had been looking for her biological father; a sperm donor. A suspect is found to be targeting vulnerable women.

programme.desc: A drone strike on a bomb-making compound in Afghanistan reveals the body of a recently retired marine, leaving the team to investigate why he returned to Afghanistan and whether or not he betrayed the country he fought for.

programme.title: Reba: The Good Girl
programme.desc: A rebellious Reba takes Van's new sports car out for a spin and ends up scratching it.

programme.title: Reba: Happy Pills

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman

programme.title: Movie: Wedding at Graceland
programme.desc: A busy couple decide to get married in Graceland in June, but, she's fresh from a tour and has a new album due. The couple take on the challenge, and throw together the best, quickie wedding, they can manage.

programme.title: The Closer: Four to Eight
programme.desc: When two Catorce gang members are shot to death, Brenda and her squad must solve the case.

programme.title: The Closer: Manhunt
programme.desc: It looks to be the return of a serial killer when two bodies turn up dead. With the knowledge that he kills in sets of three, Chief Pope charges Brenda and her squad to hunt down the killer before a third victim is taken.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Snitch
programme.desc: While the Major Crimes unit investigates a complicated gangland shooting, Det. Amy Sykes finds she must protect the identify of a witness capable of identifying the killer.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Personal Effects
programme.desc: When the squad comes across a pile of bones, they fall into a web of connections as they find their victim has an unnerving past. Meanwhile, Rusty continues to pursue his investigation of the Alice case with the help of a new friend.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Targets of Opportunity
programme.desc: After an officer-involved shooting leaves two L.A. policemen dead, the Major Crimes unit must work with the Deputy Chief of the LAPD Special Operations Bureau, Fritz Howard, to piece together this high stakes case of disguise.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love the Way You Lie
programme.desc: A famous author is found dead in what looks like a suicide, but there seems to be more to the story. Meanwhile, Frost reviews an old case concerning a convicted murderer to see if the wrong man was found guilty.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Web of Lies
programme.desc: The shooting of a newspaper carrier in rural Mississippi lands 20-year-old Marlon Howell on death row. Convicted on the word of two co-defendants and the identification of an eyewitness with a checkered past, Marlon maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder on the Mountain
programme.desc: An entire family is brutally murdered in their home in California, with their eight-year-old son being the only survivor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Fatal Fortune
programme.desc: While an Austin, Texas media mogul clings to life after a shotgun blast to the stomach, his wife's history of psychiatric institutionalization pique's investigators interest.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Spoiled to Death
programme.desc: A wealthy Colorado furrier makes headlines after her ex-boyfriend is gunned down.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Date With the Devil
programme.desc: Recently-divorced mom Ingrid Lyne dips her toes back into the dating scene and meets a man online. But her date at a baseball game would be her last. The next day investigators are shocked by a chilling crime scene.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mommy's Dirty Deeds
programme.desc: Mike Williams mysteriously disappears on his wedding anniversary, and it looks like he may have been eaten by alligators. But looks can be deceiving. A break in the case reveals the married family man’s life wasn’t quite what he thought.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: The Pastor's Secrets
programme.desc: Churchgoers knew something was up when pastor Matthew Winkler didn’t show up for services. After he’s found dead on his bedroom floor, twisted sex fantasies and dark family secrets start to surface.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Overproof and Under the Gun
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt oatmeal raisin shine for a high-flying Nashville customer. Mike and Jerry find themselves under the gun when they overdeliver on proof to a biker gang. Mark and Huck forge a lifeline to old-time shiners deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: As Tickle and the Laws start a massive rye run, a mysterious tip results in too much of a good thing. Jerry gets rushed to the hospital and Mike finds himself shorthanded. Tim comes up with a recipe for a first ever single malt moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Sweet Corn Revenge
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Mark and Huck are greeted with a gun on a mountain run while Mark and Digger land a skilled new partner. Later, Jerry attempts a drastic comeback after abandoning his column still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke to the Fire
programme.desc: Facing more rye and apples than the Laws can run, Josh moves his steamer still to Virginia and Tickle adds smoke to the fire. Mark and Huck help Jim Tom turn cherries into shine. Mike and Jerry risk a huge run in the barn of an unsuspecting farmer.

programme.title: Six Degrees With Mike Rowe: discovery+ 1st Look: How Civil War Soldiers Produced This Show
programme.desc: Engineer Charles Bachman III created the first database management system with infrastructure that is now used to power the internet. Mike Rowe shows how this incredible technology began with hungry Civil War troops and a wartime cookbook.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke to the Fire
programme.desc: Facing more rye and apples than the Laws can run, Josh moves his steamer still to Virginia and Tickle adds smoke to the fire. Mark and Huck help Jim Tom turn cherries into shine. Mike and Jerry risk a huge run in the barn of an unsuspecting farmer.

programme.title: Six Degrees With Mike Rowe: discovery+ 1st Look: How Civil War Soldiers Produced This Show
programme.desc: Engineer Charles Bachman III created the first database management system with infrastructure that is now used to power the internet. Mike Rowe shows how this incredible technology began with hungry Civil War troops and a wartime cookbook.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Mammoth Claw
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is finally down to virgin ground but discovers their equipment is no match for the giant boulders at Rockfall Ravine, so Wes fabricates a new tool for their arsenal: The Mammoth Claw. Fred puts greenhorn Scott to the test.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Fistful of Nuggets
programme.desc: Dustin's gamble of investing his life savings into these claims pays off after Carlos removes a monster boulder and finds chunky nuggets. Fred and crew battle the Trifecta, and a game-changing discovery proves Fred's theory of the ancient waterfall.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: On a gold streak, Dustin dives deeper than ever and uncovers the largest obstacle of his career. New recruit Scott finally gets the opportunity to prove himself in the water, but a rookie mistake could end his career just as it gets started.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Happy Endings
programme.desc: Dustin calls on local legend 'The Pirate' for help cracking a boulder blocking him from the richest ground of his life. After Fred is forced to put all diving on hold, Paul returns and they're on track to get gold for the first time this season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Dustin to the Rescue
programme.desc: Fred turns to his son Dustin for help when he uncovers a giant overhanging boulder at The Trifecta on the side wall that threatens to kill any diver below it. But tensions run high once Dustin takes control of Fred's operation.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Canyons
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face down the high desert canyons of Matt's home of 20 years: southern Utah. Without knives or any modern supplies, they attempt to survive and seek rescue in this harsh terrain that's more favorable to rattlesnakes and mountain lions.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Joe and Matt trek through the Alleghany Mountains of Pennsylvania, where Joe grew-up and first learned survival skills. Traveling in freezing rain, blocked by steep ravines, and deep in bear country, they're racing against Mother Nature to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamplandia
programme.desc: Stranded in a black water swamp in southern Georgia, Joe and Matt are deep in alligator territory where peat bogs, mysterious floating islands, and poisonous snakes stand in the way of getting out and finding rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Coastal Catastrophe
programme.desc: Marooned on a rocky coast in the Pacific Northwest, Matt and Joe struggle to get away from powerful waves and come head to head over the question of whether to hunker down or travel deeper into one of the darkest, wettest forest in the United States.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Himalayan Hardship
programme.desc: In the Himalayas, Joe seeks rescue from the rocky terrain, dense forest, and animal threats while Matt seems more interested in achieving spiritual enlightenment than getting out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Namibian Nightmare
programme.desc: Stranded in the vast scrubland of Namibia, Joe and Matt are in a race to get out alive from one of the driest countries on earth. They run into trouble with a troop of baboons, proving that Mother Nature isn't the only force in the wilderness.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Love in the Time of Corona
programme.desc: To keep boredom at bay during the summer quarantine, the kids rope Trent and Amber into viral video challenges. It's great family fun, but the cabin fever is putting a cramp in Trent and Amber's bedroom life, so they decide to try a pole dancing class.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: What's Cooking, Good Looking?

programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Tacos with Guy Episode

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord of the Cougars
programme.desc: Kendall suffers from sleep paralysis, which threatens her work and travel life. Meanwhile, Kim searches for methods to control her anxiety and Scott develops an unlikely friendship with Kris and her girlfriends.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Controversies and Legacies
programme.desc: Kim's decision to try for a third child proves to be a matter of life and death. Meanwhile Kendall fears backlash from supporting stricter gun control, and Kris gets emotional upon recognizing her mom won't be around forever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Time to Dash
programme.desc: During a trip to Miami, a major department store makes an offer to buy Dash that leads to Kim, Kourtney, and Khloé arguing about the store's future. Later, Kourtney struggles to enjoy herself around Scott and Khloé keeps her new relationship from Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Last Ditch Effort
programme.desc: Kim undergoes one final procedure on her uterus in an attempt to carry another baby, but suffers from dangerous complications. Meanwhile, Khloe worries that if her new denim line does not meet its high sales expectations.

programme.title: Chopped: All-Stars Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: There's just one more spot in the Grand Finale up for grabs, and Rocco DiSpirito, Jet Tila, Fabio Viviani and Lee Anne Wong all want it. The All-Stars open the appetizer baskets and find a succulent seafood and an Asian pastry.

programme.title: Chopped: All-Stars Tournament: Grand Finale
programme.desc: With four winning All-Stars returning to the Chopped Kitchen, and $75,000 on the line for someone's favorite charity, the judges are set to enjoy a masterful meal.

programme.title: Chopped: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner!
programme.desc: The usual rounds are replaced with breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Chopped: Poke Power
programme.desc: The chefs race the clock as they attempt to bring dynamic flavours to their dishes including a creative take on poke and some special seafood in round one.

programme.title: Chopped: Short and Sweetbreads
programme.desc: The chefs open the appetizer basket and find sweetbreads, which they must make into a dish in 20 minutes. Then, the chefs must work with a strong spice blend in the entree round.

programme.title: Chopped: Grudge Match: Battle 4
programme.desc: Chopped legends face off for a chance at the $100,000 finale. In round one, the chefs must incorporate a sweet breakfast item into an appetizer, and a clever fusion food in the entree basket has the potential to bring crunch and flavor to the dishes.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Parking Lot Party
programme.desc: Four feisty chefs rustle up ingredients from supermarket shoppers to create perfect party snacks. Then, there's nothing better for the after party than a hearty breakfast, and it's a mad dash to the finish as the chefs prepare dueling decadent desserts.

programme.title: Chopped: Clam Clash
programme.desc: The chefs must create appetizers from clams and a sweet dried fruit. Squid ink and a strong-flavored candy are part of the entree round puzzle. A pie made with beans and a drink with sorbet for dessert.

programme.desc: Four of the most talented Chopped Junior competitors have made their way to the finale to compete for a third win, the title and $25,000! The basket powers-that-be throw them a whopper of a first basket that includes a rather wild jerky.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mom on the Farm
programme.desc: Molly's mom is visiting on the weekend, so she cooks a supper with all her mom's favourite dishes, starting with chicken paprikash. For sides she makes spatzle and zucchini with walnut pesto and dessert is her cute stuffed challah hedgehogs.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Birthday Boys
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is celebrating two birthdays on the farm: her husband, Nick, and his dad, Roger. She's making a lunch menu that features both of their favorites, starting with Nick's favorite chicken shawarma tacos served with a tasty Moroccan carrot salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Entertaining the Girls
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's girlfriends are coming over for dinner so she's preparing her go-to special menu. There's going to be make-ahead sticky rhubarb short ribs, a show-stopping crispy saffron rice dish and a fresh side of green beans with potato chip crunch.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Picnic Blowout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh starts the day off with cheesy breakfast juicy Lucys for herself and her husband, Nick. Then she assembles a picnic with pickle dip fried bologna sandwiches, falafel-y farfalle and colorful tie-dye cookies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Merc Story
programme.desc: Ree's opened her store, The Mercantile, and she's sharing the epic tale of opening day while making three get-ahead dinners. There's family favorite butternut mac and cheese, then Tuscan bean soup. Next, she cooks up ready to go chili packets.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Tex Mex
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is whipping up four 16-minute Tex-Mex marvels for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. She makes a fried egg-topped Breakfast Tostada for a speedy and satisfying start to the day.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four In Hand
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has portable food in hand with four fantastic on-the-go ideas. There's breakfast bagel burgers that are the perfect start to the day for a teenage cowboy. Taco chicken Caesar salad wraps are a great on-the-go meal.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast Freezer Faves
programme.desc: It's a busy day on the ranch for Ree Drummond as she fills her freezer with breakfast favorites and makes breakfast for the guys out working cattle. Her to-make list includes freezer breakfast paninis and very berry croissants.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Birthday for Two
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her husband, Ladd, are celebrating their birthdays with a dinner for two. While he's out on the ranch, she makes skillet spaghetti and meatballs with her favourite cheesy pesto garlic bread pinwheel.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Vacation at Home
programme.desc: Ree Drummond goes global for delicious inspiration while staying cozy in her kitchen. She crosses the Atlantic for an all-in-one take on a Full English Breakfast and heads to North Africa for a Chicken Tagine. Dessert is a trio of Brazilian Brigadeiros.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Love is in the Aisle
programme.desc: In Triple G's Valentine's Day special, chefs discover that Guy's gift of chocolate is not the perfect match for their savory starter. Next, will there be enough time or money to shop for and prepare their desserts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: A Culinary Spelling Bee

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?
programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Jungle Oasis
programme.desc: In Florida, Lucas is determined to transform a blended family's outdated pool into the ultimate jungle oasis. Later, an ocean-loving couple request an outdoor water room that even a mermaid could love.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: The Greatest Escape

programme.title: The Zoo: Love Shack

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treetop Taphouse

programme.desc: Tia and parolee William go the extra mile to ensure a shy, special needs dog is adopted by a couple from Florida. Then, Mariah enlists a parolee's help to rescue a dangerously skinny dog. And, Tania and Perry struggle to plan their unconventional wedding.

programme.desc: After moving 20 times in 28 years, a couple is ready to make the move into a recently purchased Victorian their last. The rooms are a hash of renovations past, so Dave and Jenny Marrs help turn this house into a modern home where they'll want to stay.

programme.desc: After seeing overhaul they did on her parent's house, a woman moving back to Bentonville knows that Dave and Jenny can create her dream home, too. The Marrs use her love of pink to craft the ultimate starter home that she'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Life-Changing, Marrs Family Renovation

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Victorian Gets Some Street Style
programme.desc: Steve and Leanne Ford are asked to tackle the first floor of an old Victorian row house that is drowning in wallpaper. Their first order of business is to brighten and lighten the whole space, then overhaul the dungeon of a kitchen.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Mid-Century Mess Gets Modern Makeover
programme.desc: A dark mid-century home is the wildest house on the block, but it hasn't been lived in for over a decade. Leanne and Steve Ford transform this funky home into a sleek oasis with mold remediation, plenty of demo and a bridge build.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: First Floor Blowout
programme.desc: The Fords are tasked with updating the first floor of a regal Victorian house built in 1885. The owners of this elegant home are both young and traditional in their style, so Leanne looks to create an entertaining floor that's a perfect balance.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Building Character
programme.desc: A young couple needs a larger space for their family, so Steve and Leanne decide to reconfigure the floor plan to transform their small house into a home with plenty of elbowroom.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: House With a Circle Ceiling
programme.desc: Steve and Leanne are called on to restore a mid-century modern Pittsburgh home for a pair of music lovers.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: After many failed attempts at fixing up the 1920s Tudor he grew up in, a couple brings in the Fords to finish the job. Leanne wants to stay true to the era of the home, but must quickly come up with a new plan when Steve discovers water damage.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: Take Down That Wall
programme.desc: When Steve's good friends ask for help with their 1970s contemporary home, the Fords come to the rescue. Leanne draws inspiration from a reclaimed wood mantle and brings their dream of a ski lodge in Pittsburgh to life.

programme.title: Restored by the Fords: The Power of Paint
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple that bought a mid-century modern home to start their lives together needs Leanne and Steve Ford to make it modern-day cool. The worst offender is the zig-zag kitchen which Leanne has a design solution for.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Pol'r Plunge
programme.desc: In this special episode of The Incredible Dr. Pol, Dr. Pol challenges Charles to take part in the local Special Olympics charity event, the Polar Plunge, where participants dive into an icy lake in the height of winter.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Charles In Charge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and Diane leave a busy clinic for a much-needed vacation, leaving their son Charles in charge.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Baby, It's Cold Outside
programme.desc: A Great Dane is adopted.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pigs in a Blanket
programme.desc: Cold temperatures present the staff with challenges keeping the animals warm.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Curse of Mummified Beast
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating Egyptian catacombs are baffled to discover dozens of mummified cats in a maze of tombs; historians turn to science and cutting-edge analysis to decode their purpose and discover secrets behind an ancient religious practice.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls: New Evidence
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Curse of Mummified Beast
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating Egyptian catacombs are baffled to discover dozens of mummified cats in a maze of tombs; historians turn to science and cutting-edge analysis to decode their purpose and discover secrets behind an ancient religious practice.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls: New Evidence
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Tower of Terror
programme.desc: Fearless technicians battle staggering heights and fierce winds to upgrade a communications tower that keeps millions connected; special access to this dangerous job site reveals what it takes to get the job done.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Storm Surge Emergency
programme.desc: When sea levels rise, storm surge barriers work overtime to fight off devastating floods. To get this tough job done, a team of experts maintain these engineering marvels to prevent catastrophe and keep millions of people safe.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Hell on Water
programme.desc: A committed crew of mariners race against the clock as they dredge North America's busiest shipping canal to allow safe passage for huge oil tankers, and specialists repair years of heavy damage and corrosion to get a massive ferry safely operating.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: High-Wire Hell
programme.desc: Working thousands of feet above the California desert, brave engineers and fearless crews perform perilous high-wire acts to keep the hi-tech tramway system operating safely for the hundreds of daily tourists it transports.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Mission Las Vegas
programme.desc: Brave lighting technicians battle extreme desert conditions to keep the lights bright in Las Vegas; they put their lives at stake to perform risky neon bulb replacements at terrifying heights and surrounded by hundreds of volts of electricity.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Leaning Towers of Terror
programme.desc: A city with hundreds of leaning buildings, the world's scariest airport, and the world's biggest sewage pipe are home to engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Death Ray Skyscraper
programme.desc: A skyscraper so dangerous that it can melt cars, a bridge fiasco, and a stadium roof on the brink of disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Peril at the Airport
programme.desc: An airport that's sinking into the sea, a strange tower that goes wrong, and a dangerous bridge in Venice are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Holes from Hell
programme.desc: Engineering catastrophes include a giant tunnel boring machine stuck underground, a village sinking into a mountain, and massive holes that could derail a train.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Disaster in Vegas
programme.desc: Experts assess a giant sinkhole, a multi-million dollar road to nowhere, and a wind turbine on the brink of disaster, and determine if these engineering catastrophes can be repaired.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Stadium Disaster
programme.desc: A stadium on the brink of collapse, an upside-down bridge, and a massive subway project in crisis are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror at Doomsday Dam
programme.desc: When America's tallest dam threatens to burst, a nearby town finds itself an hour away from total annihilation, and engineers use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: The Perfect Suspect: The Killer in the Corn
programme.desc: When a young couple is found murdered and mutilated on the outskirts of a small town in Ohio, police work tirelessly to build a case against an unlikely suspect. It will take more than twenty-five years for the terrible truth to finally be revealed.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes. As Jennifer is taken hostage by an unstable man, she soon connects with a 9-1-1 operator who will stop at nothing to see that Jennifer makes it out alive.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Close friends are investigated after the death of an 83-year-old grandfather who was having an affair with a woman half his age.

programme.title: See No Evil: Vanished at Noon
programme.desc: On November 26th, 2014, Jessica Padgett disappears. The only lead is her abandoned white Subaru. Surveillance cameras show her driving into a parking lot and walking down a back alley, never to return.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Surviving Ted Bundy
programme.desc: Three women who were attacked by the notorious serial killer Ted Bundy reveal their terrifying stories of that night, and their healing and hope.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Surviving Ted Bundy
programme.desc: Three women who were attacked by the notorious serial killer Ted Bundy reveal their terrifying stories of that night, and their healing and hope.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Lack of answers in her daughter's murder force a mother to embark on a years-long quest to change nationwide laws that finally allow her to catch a killer.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Try, Try Again
programme.desc: When a single mother with a 4-year-old daughter is murdered, the case threatens to go cold until the little girl grows up and vows to get justice.

programme.title: Bride Killa: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Filled with overwhelming jealousy, 48-year-old reformed bad boy Robert Arvizu accuses his new bride Courtney Burton of being too flirtatious. In a blind rage, he faces off against his beautiful newlywed and their fiery romance takes a horrific turn.

programme.title: Happily Never After: The Devil's Devotion
programme.desc: Godly Llius finds her eternal forever when she pledges her love to music promoter Tony. But their holy union is disrupted in the most gruesome of ways. As detectives look closer, sinister truths emerge from the darkness to reveal a devilish devotion.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: Criminal lovebirds Roger Gillett and Lisa Chamberlin plan a quiet trip out of town to keep police off their trail. But when they show up at Roger's cousin's home, things quickly spiral out of control leading authorities to a barn filled with horrors.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Prey For Me
programme.desc: Suburban housewife Dawn Fowler is tired of her crippled husband, Richard. With made-up tales of Richard's 'abuse', Dawn hatches a plan to seduce a youth pastor, Robert Heydman, and convince him to kill her husband and free her from his reign of terror.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Killer Colleagues
programme.desc: Zoe Pulver and Jane Long have great jobs working for Ashley Pollow, a talented tax attorney in Florida. But Ashley also has a violent temper, and when a grisly murder takes place at the office, Jane and Zoe find themselves way too close to the killer.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Evil In the House of the Lord
programme.desc: In Nashville, a fire engulfs a local church. Once the flames are out, firefighters find a charred body, and it looks like it's the church pastor, Rev. David Terry. The body has been dismembered and beheaded. The last man to see Terry alive is missing.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A stay-at-home mom's idyllic life is shattered when she becomes the target of a disturbed predator disguised as the boy next door. With rape and murder on his mind, Donnie Russell is a twisted sociopath just waiting for his opportunity to pounce.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: You Could Be Next
programme.desc: Theories arise when a sheriff's wife opens a door to a blaze of gunfire. When more citizens are shot at their front doors, everyone's left wondering who's next.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: The Deacon's Demise
programme.desc: In 1992, a church deacon from Upland, CA is found murdered in Tijuana. Did a secret double life lead to the death of this married father of four? Years later, a fresh look at the case helps investigators unravel the complex plot to murder the deacon.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Murder in Paradise
programme.desc: When pretty Nags Head tourist Janet Siclari turns up dead on the beach outside her hotel, the fun comes to an end. When a hurricane blows leads out of town, police wonder if the killer escaped too. Only time can help detectives catch the culprit.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Budget Bungalow

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Feast Over Flame
programme.desc: Visit Skylight Inn, family-run restaurant in North Carolina who have been serving whole hog-style barbecue since the mid 1800s.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Trucks
programme.desc: Big Red Rig, a bright red, double-decker, thirty-foot trailer tricked out with two massive smokers cooking traditional pulled pork.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fired-Up Chefs
programme.desc: Two chefs from Texas who love to play with smoke and fire in their restaurants. Tom Spaulding serves classic Texas-style barbecue at his restaurant Live Oak and Tim Byres rolls out spice-rubbed chickens from his unique wood-burning rotisserie.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoked Out
programme.desc: Where there's fire, there's smoke, and some of the most flavourful meat on the market.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Brooklyn
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man winner, Eddie Hall hits Brooklyn to take on a huge Mac and Cheese eating challenge, sample NYC's best cheesecake and bend metal with a Coney Island strongman.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Houston
programme.desc: In Houston, Eddie faces the grim reaper in a crazy crawfish challenge featuring the fearsome Reaper Pepper, devours real southern comfort-food and pulls a full-sized plane down a runway.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Behemoths
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Providence, where a traditional Rhode Island hot wiener in a crepe topped with chili is the ultimate local comfort food. In Indianapolis, he digs into a steak patty topped with Chinese char siu slaw.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Behemoths
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Providence, where a traditional Rhode Island hot wiener in a crepe topped with chili is the ultimate local comfort food. In Indianapolis, he digs into a steak patty topped with Chinese char siu slaw.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: San Diego Surf 'n' Turf
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best meal deals in San Diego. He starts off with Brazilian-style hash browns stuffed with eggs, cheese and garlic.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Rio

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Central New York
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights the local favorites in central New York, finding beef and veal sausages at one of America's oldest hot dog stands, half-moon cookies that predate New York City's iconic black and white cookie and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, including salted and dried cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, sponge cake and Port wine.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: K-Nein/ Bromance
programme.desc: Kick rescues an injured stray dog, but when he discovers she's a safety dog, trained to prevent accidents, Kick must decide between keeping the dog and being a daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kicked Out/ Kick the Habit
programme.desc: When Kick's new hangout is taken over by Brad and his friends, Kick does everything in his power to keep the newfound space as his own.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Diary/ Sew What
programme.desc: Dad forces Kick and Brad to behave and stay out of each other's personal belongings.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Frame Story/ And ... Action!
programme.desc: The principal accuses Kick of a crime he didn't commit, threatening to expel him from school. When Kick meets his female counterpart in a popular TV actress, he helps her discover her inner daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Say Cheese/ Pinch Sitter
programme.desc: Kick and his siblings must overcome their differences to replace a picture they broke.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Things That Make You Go Boom!/ Kyle Be Back
programme.desc: Kick battles Brad to win a scavenger hunt; Kick's cousin tries to break a stunt record.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Pool Daze/ Live-In Wade
programme.desc: Kick leads his friends in a battle for freedom and fun when the lifeguards at the community pool force them to stay in the kiddie pool.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Switching Gears/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Kick's bike is badly damaged hours before the annual BMX Rodeo. The competition gets fierce when Kick decides to ride the Mustang Menace, a supposedly untameable bike. Brad forms a band and takes over the garage, so Kick decides to form his own band.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Crumbs!/ Stay Cool
programme.desc: Kick must keep Mom's cookies away from Dad, a relentless cookie-fiend.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kart to Kart/ Kyle 2.0
programme.desc: When Gordie Gibble buys Mellowbrook's go-kart track, he bans the Buttowskis. Kick spends time with cousin Kyle in order to score tickets to Dirk Bike Mike's Demo-Cross.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Room/ Dude, Where's My Wade?
programme.desc: When Kick's room is destroyed, Dad grounds Kick and makes him move into Brad's room where he must abide by his older brother's ridiculous rules. Kick and Gunther follow clues to track down Wade when he goes missing before the safety inspector's visit.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Greatest Tag-Battle Ever!
Polaris: Player Select: Got Any Gravy?
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.desc: New information prompts the re-opening of an old kidnapping investigation, forcing Captain Raydor into partnership with a potentially corrupt FBI agent. Meanwhile, Rusty works with the team on the case to secretly gather information.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a YouTube video of a bloodied, half-naked man walking down the middle of a street with a gun goes viral, Major Crimes must decide whether the victim was targeted or a potential suicide.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Fifth Dynasty
programme.desc: After Major Crimes identifies a murder victim as the son of State Superior Court judge known for being tough on criminals, the squad hunts through her current case load for clues. They find a case linked to an Aryan motorcycle gang and a missing boy.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: We Are Family
programme.desc: A community parade turns deadly in a case that brings family tensions and politics to the forefront. Meanwhile, Maura is not quite herself and a surprise visit from Lt. Col. Casey Jones reveals some shocking news.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Sugar Daddy Death
programme.desc: A married Google executive is found dead on his luxury yacht, those close to him are left baffled when the autopsy results are released. The only clue into Forrest Hayes’ death is a sexy woman seen on the boat’s surveillance.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Date With the Devil
programme.desc: Recently-divorced mom Ingrid Lyne dips her toes back into the dating scene and meets a man online. But her date at a baseball game would be her last. The next day investigators are shocked by a chilling crime scene.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Royalty, Romance, and Revenge

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When Mary Ann Langley finds her husband James nearly burned to death in their home, investigators must race to determine if it was an accident or assault before they lose him.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: Sandee Rozzo is preparing to face her attacker at court when she’s gunned down in her garage. The culprit seems obvious, but as detectives dig deeper, they learn nothing about this case is cut and dry.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Lethal Lover
programme.desc: When police respond to a harrowing 9-1-1 call from a man pleading for his life, they are led on the trail of a revenge plot more disturbing than the young victim’s worst nightmare.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Cashed Out
programme.desc: When a mother of six is viciously slain in her Sarasota home, police wonder if her wealthy ex-husband might have been involved in the crime?

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wounded Warbird
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey greenlights Heather Sterzick's first solo repo, but she pays the price for her mistakes. Mike Kennedy returns to his old stomping grounds in Puerto Rico to recover a relic from the old family business.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Get Rich or Die Flyin'
programme.desc: With three assets and three million bucks on the table, Kevin is looking at one of the most complex missions of his career. To pull it off, Kevin calls in Mike Kennedy. Meanwhile, Ken and Danny hunt down a one million dollar race boat.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Blood and Mud
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey ends up battered and bruised after snatching a $1 million Falcon 20 owned by a debtor he has a long, rocky history with. Mike Kennedy is called in to repo a Cessna 208 Caravan used in the illegal trafficking of exotic animals.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Heist High, Heist Low
programme.desc: Mike pushes his limits as he attempts his first-ever helicopter heist. Ken and Danny put their skills to the test as they attempt to defeat rival repo men on the biggest yacht heist of their careers.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Panic at 10,000
programme.desc: Over the skies of North Texas, Kevin and Heather have grabbed themselves a Lear jet. But when a mechanical failure leads to a dangerous imbalance in the jet's fuel load, Kevin Lacey must descend through a building storm to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Heist High, Heist Low
programme.desc: Mike pushes his limits as he attempts his first-ever helicopter heist. Ken and Danny put their skills to the test as they attempt to defeat rival repo men on the biggest yacht heist of their careers.

programme.desc: Over the skies of North Texas, Kevin and Heather have grabbed themselves a Lear jet. But when a mechanical failure leads to a dangerous imbalance in the jet's fuel load, Kevin Lacey must descend through a building storm to make an emergency landing.
