programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Sparks fly round the BattleBox as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in a deadly battle of horizontal spinners. Undefeated Malice and MadCatter duke it out while Uppercut takes on SawBlaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Slick-driving Whiplash looks to get its championship aspirations back on track against Gruff's menacing flamethrowers. Underdog Rusty attempts to upset veteran Beta and Hypershock locks horns with Mammoth in a gear-grinding main-event showdown.

programme.title: BattleBots: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Whiplash attempts to stage a comeback against Gruff's flamethrowers and Underdog Rusty attempts an upset with veteran Beta. Hypershock does battle with Mammoth in a gear-grinding main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Hit the Jackpot!
programme.desc: Desperate to avoid a winless season, Huge faces Kraken. It's veteran vs. rookie as Lock-Jaw fights Jackpot, and only one can go 3-0. Tournament favorite Tombstone protects his crown against a bot that was built to dethrone him: Skorpios!

programme.title: BattleBots: Don't FLIP OUT!
programme.desc: BattleBots Champion Bite Force squares off against famed bot Yeti, while another legendary builder returns to the competition with a brand-new epic bot.

programme.title: BattleBots: Hit the Jackpot!
programme.desc: Desperate to avoid a winless season, Huge faces Kraken. It's veteran vs. rookie as Lock-Jaw fights Jackpot, and only one can go 3-0. Tournament favorite Tombstone protects his crown against a bot that was built to dethrone him: Skorpios!

programme.title: BattleBots: Don't FLIP OUT!
programme.desc: BattleBots Champion Bite Force squares off against famed bot Yeti, while another legendary builder returns to the competition with a brand-new epic bot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rise 'n Shine!
programme.desc: Tim, Tickle and a few rookies are all going for a piece of a $100 million dollar jackpot. A new lawman in town has everyone walking on shells.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Passing the Torch
programme.desc: As Warden Richards reminisces on his career during the last day on the job, he races to rescue a cow being attacked by a pack of hunting dogs. At the academy, new recruits wrangle a gator, while anglers are caught illegally fishing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Reckless Behavior
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property. Then, stray bullets are shot into a horse owner's home, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chasing a Dead Man
programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water. When a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down, and a man is found trespassing while fishing.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Parker returns to the Klondike and records the biggest gold haul of his career. Tony travels deep into the wilderness to resurrect of a gold-catching monster. Rick's forced to find better ground. Fred makes a big change to get on the gold.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Alligator Feet
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent faces an eight-hour surgery to repair the worst case of dancer's feet she's ever seen. A woman's club feet give Dr. Schaeffer a shocking surprise when he removes her shoes.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Bloomin' Bunions
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent's patient has feet that are so crooked her toes don't touch the floor, and Dr. Schaeffer meets a woman with behemoth bunions. Rachel has a toe crawling up her foot, and Dr. Haller has to get it back in line.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Belly Dancer Mystery

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Top Priority of NASA

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Smile Now, Cry Later

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miracle on the Mountain
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman takes the biggest gamble and turns his back on guaranteed gold in the Klondike. Tony Beets expands his empire, buying a huge second dredge. Parker Schnabel starts his new season without his grandfather and mentor.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Misery on the Mountain
programme.desc: Todd battles to get the 50oz of gold he needs to keep his High Bar mine open. Tony brings all his children together to get his Paradise Hill claim up and running. Parker is furious at a series of human errors which cost him thousands of dollars.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Crane, No Gain

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Small House, Big Problems

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Far Out Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are lured to North Hollywood, CA, by a 1930s Spanish home. They want to appeal to trendy Los Angeles buyers by preserving the historic architecture, but the home's inconvenient distance causes unexpected issues during renovations.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Better Be Quick
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take out an expensive loan to flip a house in Fountain Valley, CA. A tight timeline pressures them to flip the house quickly.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on one of their biggest projects to date in Anaheim Hills, California, but modernizing this 90's mansion will cost them a fortune. If they don't get the design just right, it could jeopardize the profit and their big investment.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flew the Coop

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Finding Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Amelia Earhart's disappearance is one of America's greatest unsolved mysteries, but now, forensic science might finally crack the case, as experts examine human remains that could be proof positive of her whereabouts.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Beyond the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Secret
programme.desc: Debra Coffey and Melissa Lewis are best friends working together at a prestigious law firm in Ft. Lauderdale, Florida. When Melissa is found brutally murdered in a canal, Debra is consumed with guilt as a dark secret is revealed.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When Valerie Tieman goes missing her parents Allen and Sarajean begin to worry. Valerie's body is later found buried in the woods behind the home she shares with husband Luc.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: Shattered: Driftwood Killer
programme.desc: 1994. New Castle, DE. A deadly fire claims what appears to be an innocent victim, leaving a woman shaken by her sister's death... a detective learns the fire is not an accident - but a murder... and a man discovers the true nature of his brother.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Drowning in Tears
programme.desc: When Tim meets Maryann at a Catholic mixer, it's a match made in heaven. But while the future looks bright, a dark cloud gathers on the horizon the shadow of Tim's ex-wife. Despite the best intentions, everyone knows that raising a family can be murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Coed Killer
programme.desc: Angela Samota is every coed's dream come true. She's smart, beautiful, and always the epicenter of every room she enters - but one day she's noticed by the wrong person, and it leads to her ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Two Men and A Slaying
programme.desc: A man rents out a room to an old buddy, but their contrasting living habits create chaos in the house. Tiny arguments turn into petty crimes, resulting in a vicious fight that turns deadly.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Betrayed: Coed Killer
programme.desc: Angela Samota is every coed's dream come true. She's smart, beautiful, and always the epicenter of every room she enters - but one day she's noticed by the wrong person, and it leads to her ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Two Men and A Slaying
programme.desc: A man rents out a room to an old buddy, but their contrasting living habits create chaos in the house. Tiny arguments turn into petty crimes, resulting in a vicious fight that turns deadly.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Drowning in Tears
programme.desc: When Tim meets Maryann at a Catholic mixer, it's a match made in heaven. But while the future looks bright, a dark cloud gathers on the horizon the shadow of Tim's ex-wife. Despite the best intentions, everyone knows that raising a family can be murder.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: The Ecstasy and the Agony
programme.desc: Beautiful Latvian Yekaterina Petrov's mother dies and she loses herself in the glitzy Miami nightclub scene. When she meets Mark, a handsome club promoter, the two set off on a rocky romance fueled by sex, drugs and violence, making front page news.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: After two failed relationships Michelle Covington is swept off her feet by a former high school classmate. But excessive drinking makes him abusive. The couple gets in a nasty fight with the boyfriend in danger of bleeding to death from a stab wound.

programme.title: Love Kills: Matchmaker to Murder
programme.desc: When Damarius and his girlfriend Alyssa find out she's pregnant, the couple's parents are furious. The friction culminates in a terrible tragedy, resulting the arrest of Damarius. Weeks later, a surprising twist will reveal the couple's darkest secret.

programme.title: Love Kills: Sheltered to Shackles
programme.desc: Victoria comes from a good family but can't help falling for Raymon, a bad boy from the streets. She quickly falls into a life of crime with him, breaking into homes and cars. When the couple ups the ante to armed robbery, their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: Guilty Rich: Deadly Delusions
programme.desc: Known for his eccentricities and generosity, John Du Pont is used to having it all. But the Olympic wrestling team owner battles private demons... and his money and power stand in the way of an unspeakable tragedy.

programme.title: Guilty Rich: The Millionaire an the Model
programme.desc: An aspiring model finds love and a runway to success in her vitamin tycoon husband. But behind the money and the make-up is an ugly truth... and when the marriage fails, with millions at stake, each wants the other out of the picture - forever.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Hot for Teacher
programme.desc: A seductive high school teacher began a romance with a 15-year-old student, luring him with false allegations of abuse by her husband.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Wine
programme.desc: When Nancy Lyon mysteriously died in hospital, suspicions fell on her husband, but other suspects were revealed including her brother.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: A Deadly Education
programme.desc: Facades are shed to reveal jealousy and vengeance that result in murder within a family.

programme.title: Evil Kin: Like Father, Like Sons
programme.desc: For the Woodman family, nothing seems too rich for their blood. But sometimes, having everything is never enough. When greed, jealousy and quest for power threaten their lavish lifestyle, a vicious plot unfolds to reveal an evil seeking vengeance.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: Identical twins Yvette and Doris Gay are a close-knit pair, but when they meet Renwick Gibbs, their quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome. And soon they with devise a murderous scheme that will change one innocent family's life forever.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Murder at the House of God
programme.desc: In January 2014, Nathan and Krystal Maddox are gunned down just seconds after leaving a remote Texan church. The brutal double murder leaves a close-knit community traumatized and looking for answers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Wild Bill: Marskman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own, by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: From the ashes of the Confederacy rises a bold rebel outlaw determined to get rich and get even. Jesse James is seen by many as a modern day Robin Hood, a Southern gentleman avenging the efforts of Northern businessmen to exploit his territory.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.desc: Flipping cousins, Brandon and Laurie, go toe-to-toe against engaged DIYers, Kim and Tim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Winner, Winner, Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Heading back to his Southern roots, Eddie Jackson is on the hunt for the best chicken dinners. Taking comfort food to the next level, these favorite dishes are trashy, messy and spicy. Winner, winner, it's chicken for dinner!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Crazy for Crunch
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson takes a deep dive into some deep-fried dishes that are sure to satisfy the craving for crunch. These creations have crunchy coatings so crispy that you have to see it to believe it.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Goa
programme.desc: Andrew explores the local cuisine of Goa, a former Portuguese colony in western India.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Undiscovered Hawaii
programme.desc: Andrew wants to find out what Hawaiians really like to eat. From dried octopus bile sac to crispy pork intestine, Andrew gets a taste of Hawaii's other side.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana

programme.title: Maury: 40 Years of Doubt ... Will DNA Prove We Have the Same Dad?
programme.desc: Heidi and John are back, because John thinks Heidi is cheating and his questioning the paternity of their daughter. Tonnette's older sisters don't think she shares their father. Sydrick is denying Doreisha's son.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Bachelor/ Bachelorette
programme.desc: When Mike's dad comes to town early for his son's bachelor party, Peggy decides she should attend Molly's bachelorette bash and proceeds to turn it into a raucous affair.

programme.title: The King of Queens: The Shmenkmans
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie embark on a campaign to find new friends without kids to worry about.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Zero Tolerance
programme.desc: Max and Caroline attempt to bring in extra money to help pay off their bank loan by taking second jobs as a pastry chef and a hostess at a chic restaurant.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Black-ish: Lemons
programme.desc: The nation is still reeling after the outcome of the presidential election, and tensions are particularly high at Dre's work. Much to his frustration, they haven't been able to get anything done since election night eight weeks ago.

programme.title: Black-ish: Churched
programme.desc: In the Johnson home, Sundays involve SAT prep and sports, so when the family is invited to Church on Sunday by the neighbours, Dre goes against his instinct of always saying 'no' and agrees.

programme.title: Walker: Back in the Saddle
programme.desc: Walker realizes his kids have developed new routines with Liam. Captain James tells Walker he needs to get recertified to be a Ranger, but old memories of Emily hinder his progress. Micki investigates a suspicious fire.

programme.title: Legacies: Goodbyes Sure Do Suck
programme.desc: The Super Squad pulls out all the stops when they learn some devastating news involving one of their own. Alaric turns to Sheriff Mac for help getting some timely affairs in order.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Pilot
programme.desc: Jerry and George finally get the chance to have their pilot produced by the network; Elaine pickets a shop.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Nap
programme.desc: George creates the perfect spot for a nap under his desk at work. Kramer begins swimming in the East River. Elaine's boyfriend sends her a new mattress that she can't seem to get rid of. Jerry hires a contractor, who decides to re-do the kitchen.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Grab a Feather and Get in Line
programme.desc: Walden and Alan go to Kate's fashion show in New York so Walden can tell her the truth about his identity.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: You're Under Foot
programme.desc: Pops has grown bored with his day-to-day life, so with a little help from Beverly, Murray convinces him to come to the store with him. Before long, Pops criticizes Murray on how he does business.

programme.title: Mom: Sawdust and Brisket
programme.desc: Christy is thrilled when Violet tells her she wants to spend more time together and improve their relationship. Also, Bonnie tries to make amends with her nemesis in the building, Beverly.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween, Mike and Chuck decide to spend the evening watching football instead of passing out candy with their wives. But when Vanessa and Carol start pranking them, the competition is on to see who can out-prank who.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Road Less Driven
programme.desc: When Vanessa and the girls surprise Mike with a 1967 Impala for his birthday, he's excited to have alone time in the garage with the car. But when the car's original owner, Joe, keeps showing up with spare parts, Mike hints that he can do this on his own.

programme.title: Mom: Diamond Earrings and a Pumpkinhead
programme.desc: When Christy falls back into old habits, Bonnie worries about her well-being.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Paulie's Secret Recipe/ Knee-jerk Ski Reaction
programme.desc: Brothers battle over a secret recipe; woman sues over ski trip accident.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Active Duty Drama/ Dumpster Dive
programme.desc: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for the return of property. A plaintiff sues a neighbour for utility fees.

programme.title: Protection Court: He Rented An Apartment in My Complex
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Brotherly Loved/ Taco Wars
programme.desc: Disagreement over money transfers; taco truck owner sues for slander.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Hulsinger vs. Maye
programme.desc: A man wonders if he or the 'refrigerator man' is the father of a two-year-old girl.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Fuel vs. Burnett
programme.desc: A Mesa, Arizona man has always acknowledged her as his 'niece'. But now she's brought him to court to find out if he's really her father.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Lacheya is seeking repayment of a loan in the amount of $703 for a loan she received to bail out her ex and child’s father Rakiem. He claims he’s not liable for anything because he never asked Lacheya to bail him out.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her younger brother for an unpaid loan and says he has been in and out of prison for selling drugs.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Trashing & Dashing ' and 'Don't Wig Out On Me.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Fouling Up a Fence ' and 'Making a Tenant Mad.'

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Ravontis says Darrell shredded her wigs, broke her phone and busted two TVs, but Darrell says he owes Ravontis nothing because his hard-earned money got them into the apartment.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Expose Child Predators
